title: Smaller Units
description: Functional Little Blocks for more modern versions
body:
Smaller Units is a mod about making blocks small... Smaller Units supports all scales from 1/2 to 1/16 by default, but can go as low as 1/256!
In places, SU can even out perform vanilla.
![Some small blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7e094cb8c3ce9731fc2ad50960ffc1612dd9f69.png) ![That's some small text!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc0c4c7afa3c099d5e310b0d729f0e78f7a22636_0.webp) Also works with shader packs, such as [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) ![RTX on?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/491ffc6b4663a9237d4690fe47332bf95815c184_0.webp) [I need to get screenshots for the recipes]
For now, use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)/[MEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) for the shrinker/grower recipes To get a unit space, place the shrinker on its own in the crafting grid To make the unit space larger, place the grower on the grid with a unit space To make it smaller, place a shrinker on the grid with a unit space Icon thanks to DrinkSomeMilk.
